Nanjing Xuantie Automation Technology Co., Ltd. is officially tagged with the heavy-industry label of 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' and lists ambitious scopes like 'Industrial Robot Manufacturing' and 'Metal Cutting Equipment Manufacturing'. However, the forensic Dual-Veto model quickly exposes a massive logistical impossibility. Despite a notably high paid-in capital of 5.5 million RMB, the company operates with only 1 insured employee in 2024. It is physically impossible to house robotic assembly lines, metalworking machinery, and mold fabrication within an incubator office run by a single individual. The high capital combined with these demographics identifies the entity as an asset-light R&D studio, a technology holding shell, or a wholesale distributor.
